title: Wynn Resorts (WYNN) Intrinsic Value — Gemini DCF Analysis
description: Discounted cash flow valuation modeling Wynn's premium casino cash flows across global jurisdictions.

assumptions.revenueGrowth: 5.5%: Projected growth accounts for the stabilization of Macau operations and the anticipated significant revenue contribution from the new UAE resort.
assumptions.terminalGrowthRate: 2.5%: Aligned with long-term global GDP growth, assuming luxury gaming demand scales with global wealth generation.
assumptions.discountRate: 9.5%: A higher WACC reflects the heightened regulatory, geopolitical, and cyclical risks associated with operating heavily in Macau.
